\tzpentry{ID3562}{Drive Potential Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3562 introduces Drive Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ V_{\rm drive}(r,t) = A_0 e^{-\frac{(r-r_c)^2}{2\sigma_A^2}} \; s(t) \]
